response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ year requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack experience, including recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB. Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling matches the unusual 'AI agent development' requirement, and a strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries and courses they authored) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are mostly around specific framework names (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, Kotlin) rather than fundamentals, so an interview is clearly warranted.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes
Hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin and Python not evidenced; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly listed despite broad testing background

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and specified testing frameworks
